name: Celery Soup (Zuppa Di Accia)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Hot meat or chicken broth
3 oz Sopressata or other dried sausage, chopped
4 oz Cacciocavallo or mild provolone cheese, chopped
Lovage leaves or chopped celery tops (Optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a soup pot over low heat. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 8 minutes.
2. Add the sliced celery, celery tops, hot broth, and salt. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer partially covered for 20 minutes.
3. Prepare the Italian toasts by lightly baking them in a 400°F oven until golden on both sides. Brush with olive oil on one side.
4. Divide eggs, sausage, and Cacciocavallo cheese evenly among the 6 servings and place on top of the toasted bread.
5. Bring the soup to a boil and ladle hot soup into each bowl. Sprinkle with grated Pecorino cheese and lovage leaves (or chopped celery tops).
6. Serve in individual bowls.
